Variables.Name: UpdateGuid
Variables.Description:
A GUID that is updated every time the foliage type is modified,
	   so foliage placed in the level can detect the FoliageType has changed.

Variables.Name: Density
Variables.Description: Foliage instances will be placed at this density, specified in instances per 1000x1000 unit area

Variables.Name: DensityAdjustmentFactor
Variables.Description: The factor by which to adjust the density of instances. Values >1 will increase density while values <1 will decrease it.

Variables.Name: Radius
Variables.Description: The minimum distance between foliage instances

Variables.Name: Scaling
Variables.Description: Specifies foliage instance scaling behavior when painting.

Variables.Name: ScaleX
Variables.Description: Specifies the range of scale, from minimum to maximum, to apply to a foliage instance's X Scale property

Variables.Name: ScaleY
Variables.Description: Specifies the range of scale, from minimum to maximum, to apply to a foliage instance's Y Scale property

Variables.Name: ScaleZ
Variables.Description: Specifies the range of scale, from minimum to maximum, to apply to a foliage instance's Z Scale property

Variables.Name: VertexColorMask_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description:
When painting on static meshes, foliage instance placement can be limited to areas where the static mesh has values in the selected vertex color channel(s).
	   This allows a static mesh to mask out certain areas to prevent foliage from being placed there

Variables.Name: VertexColorMaskThreshold_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Specifies the threshold value above which the static mesh vertex color value must be, in order for foliage instances to be placed in a specific area

Variables.Name: VertexColorMaskInvert_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description:
When unchecked, foliage instances will be placed only when the vertex color in the specified channel(s) is above the threshold amount.
	   When checked, the vertex color must be less than the threshold amount

Variables.Name: ZOffset
Variables.Description: Specifies a range from minimum to maximum of the offset to apply to a foliage instance's Z location

Variables.Name: AlignToNormal
Variables.Description:
Whether foliage instances should have their angle adjusted away from vertical to match the normal of the surface they're painted on
	   If AlignToNormal is enabled and RandomYaw is disabled, the instance will be rotated so that the +X axis points down-slope

Variables.Name: AlignMaxAngle
Variables.Description: The maximum angle in degrees that foliage instances will be adjusted away from the vertical

Variables.Name: RandomYaw
Variables.Description: If selected, foliage instances will have a random yaw rotation around their vertical axis applied

Variables.Name: RandomPitchAngle
Variables.Description: A random pitch adjustment can be applied to each instance, up to the specified angle in degrees, from the original vertical

Variables.Name: GroundSlopeAngle
Variables.Description: Foliage instances will only be placed on surfaces sloping in the specified angle range from the horizontal

Variables.Name: Height
Variables.Description: The valid altitude range where foliage instances will be placed, specified using minimum and maximum world coordinate Z values

Variables.Name: LandscapeLayers
Variables.Description: If a layer name is specified, painting on landscape will limit the foliage to areas of landscape with the specified layer painted

Variables.Name: CollisionWithWorld
Variables.Description: If checked, an overlap test with existing world geometry is performed before each instance is placed

Variables.Name: CollisionScale
Variables.Description: The foliage instance's collision bounding box will be scaled by the specified amount before performing the overlap check

Variables.Name: MinimumLayerWeight
Variables.Description: Specifies the minimum value above which the landscape layer weight value must be, in order for foliage instances to be placed in a specific area

Variables.Name: Mobility
Variables.Description: Mobility property to apply to foliage components

Variables.Name: CullDistance
Variables.Description:
The distance where instances will begin to fade out if using a PerInstanceFadeAmount material node. 0 disables.
	  When the entire cluster is beyond this distance, the cluster is completely culled and not rendered at all.

Variables.Name: bEnableStaticLighting_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Deprecated. Now use the Mobility setting to control staticdynamic lighting

Variables.Name: CastShadow
Variables.Description: Controls whether the foliage should cast a shadow or not.

Variables.Name: bAffectDynamicIndirectLighting
Variables.Description: Controls whether the foliage should inject light into the Light Propagation Volume.  This flag is only used if CastShadow is true.

Variables.Name: bAffectDistanceFieldLighting
Variables.Description: Controls whether the primitive should affect dynamic distance field lighting methods.  This flag is only used if CastShadow is true.

Variables.Name: bCastDynamicShadow
Variables.Description: Controls whether the foliage should cast shadows in the case of non precomputed shadowing.  This flag is only used if CastShadow is true.

Variables.Name: bCastStaticShadow
Variables.Description: Whether the foliage should cast a static shadow from shadow casting lights.  This flag is only used if CastShadow is true.

Variables.Name: bCastShadowAsTwoSided
Variables.Description: Whether this foliage should cast dynamic shadows as if it were a two sided material.

Variables.Name: bReceivesDecals
Variables.Description: Whether the foliage receives decals.

Variables.Name: bOverrideLightMapRes
Variables.Description: Whether to override the lightmap resolution defined in the static mesh.

Variables.Name: OverriddenLightMapRes
Variables.Description: Overrides the lightmap resolution defined in the static mesh

Variables.Name: LightmapType
Variables.Description: Controls the type of lightmap used for this component.

Variables.Name: bUseAsOccluder
Variables.Description:
If enabled, foliage will render a pre-pass which allows it to occlude other primitives, and also allows
	  it to correctly receive DBuffer decals. Enabling this setting may have a negative performance impact.

Variables.Name: BodyInstance
Variables.Description: Custom collision for foliage

Variables.Name: CustomNavigableGeometry
Variables.Description: Force navmesh

Variables.Name: LightingChannels
Variables.Description:
Lighting channels that placed foliage will be assigned. Lights with matching channels will affect the foliage.
	  These channels only apply to opaque materials, direct lighting, and dynamic lighting and shadowing.

Variables.Name: bRenderCustomDepth
Variables.Description: If true, the foliage will be rendered in the CustomDepth pass (usually used for outlines)

Variables.Name: CustomDepthStencilValue
Variables.Description: Optionally write this 0-255 value to the stencil buffer in CustomDepth pass (Requires project setting or r.CustomDepth == 3)

Variables.Name: CollisionRadius
Variables.Description: The CollisionRadius determines when two instances overlap. When two instances overlap a winner will be picked based on rules and priority.

Variables.Name: ShadeRadius
Variables.Description: The ShadeRadius determines when two instances overlap. If an instance can grow in the shade this radius is ignored.

Variables.Name: NumSteps
Variables.Description: The number of times we age the species and spread its seeds.

Variables.Name: InitialSeedDensity
Variables.Description: Specifies the number of seeds to populate along 10 meters. The number is implicitly squared to cover a 10m x 10m area

Variables.Name: AverageSpreadDistance
Variables.Description: The average distance between the spreading instance and its seeds. For example, a tree with an AverageSpreadDistance 10 will ensure the average distance between the tree and its seeds is 10cm

Variables.Name: SpreadVariance
Variables.Description: Specifies how much seed distance varies from the average. For example, a tree with an AverageSpreadDistance 10 and a SpreadVariance 1 will produce seeds with an average distance of 10cm plus or minus 1cm

Variables.Name: SeedsPerStep
Variables.Description: The number of seeds an instance will spread in a single step of the simulation.

Variables.Name: DistributionSeed
Variables.Description: The seed that determines placement of initial seeds.

Variables.Name: MaxInitialSeedOffset
Variables.Description: The seed that determines placement of initial seeds.

Variables.Name: bCanGrowInShade
Variables.Description: If true, seeds of this type will ignore shade radius during overlap tests with other types.

Variables.Name: bSpawnsInShade
Variables.Description:
Whether new seeds are spawned exclusively in shade. Occurs in a second pass after all types that do not spawn in shade have been simulated.
	  Only valid when CanGrowInShade is true.

Variables.Name: MaxInitialAge
Variables.Description: Allows a new seed to be older than 0 when created. New seeds will be randomly assigned an age in the range [0,MaxInitialAge]

Variables.Name: MaxAge
Variables.Description: Specifies the oldest a seed can be. After reaching this age the instance will still spread seeds, but will not get any older

Variables.Name: OverlapPriority
Variables.Description:
When two instances overlap we must determine which instance to remove.
	  The instance with a lower OverlapPriority will be removed.
	  In the case where OverlapPriority is the same regular simulation rules apply.

Variables.Name: ProceduralScale
Variables.Description: The scale range of this type when being procedurally generated. Configured with the Scale Curve.

Variables.Name: ScaleCurve
Variables.Description:
Instance scale factor as a function of normalized age (i.e. Current Age  Max Age).
	  X = 0 corresponds to Age = 0, X = 1 corresponds to Age = Max Age.
	  Y = 0 corresponds to Min Scale, Y = 1 corresponds to Max Scale.

Variables.Name: ReapplyDensity
Variables.Description: If checked, the density of foliage instances already placed will be adjusted by the density adjustment factor.

Variables.Name: ReapplyRadius
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances not meeting the new Radius constraint will be removed

Variables.Name: ReapplyAlignToNormal
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have their normal alignment adjusted by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyRandomYaw
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have their yaw adjusted by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyScaling
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have their scale adjusted to fit the specified scaling behavior by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyScaleX
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have their X scale adjusted by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyScaleY
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have their Y scale adjusted by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyScaleZ
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have their Z scale adjusted by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyRandomPitchAngle
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have their pitch adjusted by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyGroundSlope
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances not meeting the ground slope condition will be removed by the Reapply too

Variables.Name: ReapplyHeight
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances not meeting the valid Z height condition will be removed by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyLandscapeLayers
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances painted on areas that do not have the appropriate landscape layer painted will be removed by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyZOffset
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have their Z offset adjusted by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyCollisionWithWorld
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances will have an overlap test with the world reapplied, and overlapping instances will be removed by the Reapply tool

Variables.Name: ReapplyVertexColorMask
Variables.Description: If checked, foliage instances no longer matching the vertex color constraint will be removed by the Reapply too

Variables.Name: bEnableDensityScaling
Variables.Description:
Whether this foliage type should be affected by the Engine Scalability system's Foliage scalability setting.
	  Enable for detail meshes that don't really affect the game. Disable for anything important.
	  Typically, this will be enabled for small meshes without collision (e.g. grass) and disabled for large meshes with collision (e.g. trees)
